DELETE ACCOUNT.BLOCKED DESCRIPTION: As you are currently the sole administrator in this account, there is no way for you to delete your own profile. Such a step would leave the account without administrative supervision, which may lead to inconsistencies. To work around this issue, you can either appoint another colleague as an administrator or add a new administrator to the account. Afterward, you will have the option to delete your profile.
DELETE ACCOUNT.BLOCKED ALTERNATIVE: If you wish to terminate collaboration entirely, you also have the option to delete the entire company. You can do this under the setting 'Account → Company → 'Delete Company''.
DELETE ACCOUNT.GENERAL ERROR DESCRIPTION: We apologize, but an error has occurred. Please close the dialogue and try again.
DELETE ACCOUNT.GENERAL ERROR 10460: The last admin cannot be deleted
DELETE ACCOUNT.GOODBYE CONFIRMED: The server has confirmed your deletion request.
DELETE ACCOUNT.GOODBYE DESCRIPTION: Please note that we will begin the process of irrevocably deleting your data as soon as our server confirms your request. The duration of this process depends on the amount of data to be deleted and may vary. We assure you that we proceed with the utmost care and in accordance with all data protection regulations.
DELETE ACCOUNT.GOODBYE DESCRIPTION 2: If you decide to use our services again in the future, we would be happy to welcome you back. If you have any further questions or concerns, we are at your disposal.
DELETE ACCOUNT.GOODBYE WAIT: Please wait a moment until our server has processed your enquiry. This may take a few seconds. We ask for your patience.
DELETE ACCOUNT.MAIN WARNING: Caution: This action cannot be undone!
DELETE ACCOUNT.MAIN DESCRIPTION: Please confirm that you want to perform the permanent and irreversible deletion of your account:
DELETE ACCOUNT.MAIN DESCRIPTION 2: Note that all 360° tours for which you are currently listed as a contact will be automatically transferred to a team member of your choice.
DELETE ACCOUNT.MAIN ERROR 1: The email address must match the address of your account
DELETE ACCOUNT.MAIN ERROR 2: The email address is required to confirm deletion
DELETE ACCOUNT.MAIN HINT: Confirm the process by entering your email address

SUPPORT ACCESS.DESC 1: To provide you with optimal support, we ask for your permission to access your user account. This access is used exclusively to process your support request and in strict compliance with our data protection policies. Further information can be found in our
SUPPORT ACCESS.DESC 2: Privacy Policy for Advanced Support Access.
SUPPORT ACCESS.GRANT SUPPORT ACCESS CONFIRMATION: I agree that authorized employees of Ogulo GmbH may access my customer account to handle my support requests. I understand that I can revoke this consent at any time.
SUPPORT ACCESS.REVOKE SUPPORT ACCESS CONFIRMATION: I object to authorized employees of Ogulo GmbH accessing my customer account. I understand that as a result, some support requests may not be fully processed.
SUPPORT ACCESS.TITLE: Support Settings
